name: ArcelorMittal S.A.
h1: Arcelor Mittal's GCC footprint in India
lede: Arcelor Mittal runs three centers across three Indian cities. Hyderabad, Kolkata and Pune, covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arcelor Mittal office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: ArcelorMittal S.A. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arcelor Mittal runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Kolkata, Pune), covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Arcelor Mittal's India footprint covers Hyderabad, Kolkata and Pune, spanning GCC/GIC and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 22 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Arcelor Mittal operate in India?
faq.a: Arcelor Mittal operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Arcelor Mittal have centers in?
faq.a: Arcelor Mittal's India footprint includes Hyderabad and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Arcelor Mittal run in India?
faq.a: Arcelor Mittal runs GCC/GIC and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Arcelor Mittal's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Arcelor Mittal's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Arcelor Mittal's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Arcelor Mittal's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
